title: Table count returning function used inside other function gives wrong results.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO bar (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE baz (value INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO baz (value, description) VALUES (10, 'Ten'), (20, 'Twenty'), (NULL, 'Null Value');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS inner_count FROM bar) AS inner_count;
key_bug_features: Table count function used within another function
